problems_encountered.description: Initial attempt to set projectId context failed with access denied error. Required context reset first before setting new context parameters.

tool_response_summary: Successfully set serverId context parameter to cf24e9ff-21e8-4895-82ef-47354868a861 in session after clearing previous projectId context
execution_notes: Tool successfully sets session context parameters. Discovered that existing context must be cleared before setting new parameters that conflict with permission boundaries. The tool accepts serverId, projectId, orgId, installationId, and stackId parameters.
